title: The Hoover HF3 DynamicClean is a feather-light budget cordless stick vacuum that gets the basics right

description: This flagship shaver from Philips is smooth, smart, and slightly over-engineered.

description: A compact travel shaver with great battery life that performs as advertised — though a trimmer attachment would've been nice for beard-havers.

description: The Shark SilkiPro Straight costs less than its rivals, includes more in the box, and delivers impressive results, albeit with a few caveats.

description: The AromaFresh Therm Pro grinds exactly the right amount of beans for your brew, but the uneven results mean inconsistent flavor from your coffee.

description: The next-generation T3 Aire 360 delivers impressive results at a price that undercuts its closest rivals
